'''鈭歝h-z-n''' ('''kachazan''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:calmen|calmen]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-z-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:calmen|calmen]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歝h-z-n
|-
! Lemma
| kachazan
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichazan|thichazan]] || [[word:jichazan|jichazan]] || [[word:shichazan|shichazan]] || [[word:kichazan|kichazan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuchazan|thuthuchazan]] || [[word:jujuchazan|jujuchazan]] || [[word:shushuchazan|shushuchazan]] || [[word:kukuchazan|kukuchazan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuchazan|thuchazan]] || [[word:juchazan|juchazan]] || [[word:shuchazan|shuchazan]] || [[word:kuchazan|kuchazan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuchazan|thuchazan]] || [[word:juchazan|juchazan]] || [[word:shuchazan|shuchazan]] || [[word:kuchazan|kuchazan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thechazan|thechazan]] || [[word:jechazan|jechazan]] || [[word:shechazan|shechazan]] || [[word:kechazan|kechazan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothochazan|thothochazan]] || [[word:jojochazan|jojochazan]] || [[word:shoshochazan|shoshochazan]] || [[word:kokochazan|kokochazan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thochazan|thochazan]] || [[word:jochazan|jochazan]] || [[word:shochazan|shochazan]] || [[word:kochazan|kochazan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thochazan|thochazan]] || [[word:jochazan|jochazan]] || [[word:shochazan|shochazan]] || [[word:kochazan|kochazan]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:chazan|chazan]] || [[word:chazan|chazan]] || [[word:chazan|chazan]] || [[word:chazan|chazan]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:chazan|chazan]] || [[word:chazan|chazan]] || [[word:chazan|chazan]] || [[word:chazan|chazan]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:chazan|chazan]] || [[word:chazan|chazan]] || [[word:chazan|chazan]] || [[word:chazan|chazan]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:chazan|chazan]] || [[word:chazan|chazan]] || [[word:chazan|chazan]] || [[word:chazan|chazan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙chazan|th忙chazan]] || [[word:j忙chazan|j忙chazan]] || [[word:sh忙chazan|sh忙chazan]] || [[word:k忙chazan|k忙chazan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathachazan|thathachazan]] || [[word:jajachazan|jajachazan]] || [[word:shashachazan|shashachazan]] || [[word:kakachazan|kakachazan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thachazan|thachazan]] || [[word:jachazan|jachazan]] || [[word:shachazan|shachazan]] || [[word:kachazan|kachazan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thachazan|thachazan]] || [[word:jachazan|jachazan]] || [[word:shachazan|shachazan]] || [[word:kachazan|kachazan]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shachazan|shachazan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshachazan|goshachazan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishachazan|gokishachazan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shachazann眉|shachazann眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshachazannkn眉|goshachazannkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishachazann眉|gokishachazann眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shachazansh毛|shachazansh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshachazannksh毛|goshachazannksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishachazansh毛|gokishachazansh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachazanro|shachazanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachazannkro|goshachazannkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachazanro|gokishachazanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shachazanmu|shachazanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachazannkmu|goshachazannkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachazanmu|gokishachazanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shachazansher|shachazansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshachazannksher|goshachazannksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishachazansher|gokishachazansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shachazanng|shachazanng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshachazannkng|goshachazannkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishachazanng|gokishachazanng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shachazanya|shachazanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshachazannkya|goshachazannkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishachazanya|gokishachazanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shachazanyam|shachazanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshachazannkyam|goshachazannkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishachazanyam|gokishachazanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachazann眉sh毛|shachazann眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachazannkn眉sh毛|goshachazannkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachazann眉sh毛|gokishachazann眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachazann眉ro|shachazann眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachazannkn眉ro|goshachazannkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachazann眉ro|gokishachazann眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachazann眉mu|shachazann眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachazannkn眉mu|goshachazannkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachazann眉mu|gokishachazann眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachazansh毛n眉|shachazansh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachazannksh毛n眉|goshachazannksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachazansh毛n眉|gokishachazansh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachazansh毛ro|shachazansh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachazannksh毛ro|goshachazannksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachazansh毛ro|gokishachazansh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachazansh毛mu|shachazansh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachazannksh毛mu|goshachazannksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachazansh毛mu|gokishachazansh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachazanron眉|shachazanron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachazannkron眉|goshachazannkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachazanron眉|gokishachazanron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachazanrosh毛|shachazanrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachazannkrosh毛|goshachazannkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachazanrosh毛|gokishachazanrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachazanromu|shachazanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachazannkromu|goshachazannkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachazanromu|gokishachazanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachazanmun眉|shachazanmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachazannkmun眉|goshachazannkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachazanmun眉|gokishachazanmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachazanmush毛|shachazanmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachazannkmush毛|goshachazannkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachazanmush毛|gokishachazanmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachazanmuro|shachazanmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachazannkmuro|goshachazannkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachazanmuro|gokishachazanmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
